Description : Most people use this type of signage as their main signboard, which can be made in any shape, waterproof, and illuminated with LED lights on the 3D lettering so that people can easily recognize it during the day and at night.
Material :
- Aluminum or stainless steel box up 3D lettering
- 3mm lighting white acrylic sheet as surface
- LED Module / strip inside with transformer
Suggestion : Suitable for outdoor significant signboard, highly attract people attention.
- Back-Lit Signboard
Description : More elegance 3D wording signboard, lighting on bark of the wording, soft lighting at back and prominent the wording, various shapes can be done, water proof.
Material :
- Aluminum or stainless steel box up 3D lettering
- LED module/strip inside with transformer
Suggestion : Suitable for outdoor and indoor signage, beauty or delicacy field signboard.
- Full-Lit Signboard
Description : The whole 3D wording is light up so that it will be very attractive to the person and eye-catching.
Material :
- 3mm lighting white acrylic box up 3D lettering
- LED strip inside with transformer
Suggestion : Suitable for outdoor and indoor signage, very easy to see at night.
Working days : 10-14 working days with installation.
- Punch Hole Signboard
Description : Use LED bulbs to create a bright and eye-catching signboard that is waterproof.
Material : Aluminum box up punch hole on surface and install LED.
Suggestion : Suitable for outdoor significant signage.
Working days : 10-14 working days with installation.
- Light Bulb Signboard
Description : Use the bulb directly as an attractor to get more attention, and it is waterproof.
Material : Aluminum plate box up and install light bulb.
Suggestion : Can use in both outdoor and indoor signage.
Working days : 10-14 working days with installation.
B. 3D Non-Lighting Signboard
- Foamboard 3D Wording
Material :
- PVC Foamboard cutting out 3D wording
- Thickness can be 3mm, 5mm, 10mm and 20mm
- The color can use Printing sticker, Oracal sticker or Spray paint (pantone code)
Suggestion : The material can also be used indoors and outdoors and lasts up to two years.
- Acrylic 3D Wording
Material :
- Acrylic laser cutting out 3D wording
- Thickness can be 3mm, 5mm, 10mm, 15mm and 20mm
- The color can be original acrylic color (standard in clear, lighting white and black color) or using Printing sticker or Oracal sticker
Suggestion : This material is suitable for indoor use, more elegant.
- Aluminium Box Up 3D Wording
Material :
- Aluminium or stainless steel box up 3D lettering spray paint
- Thickness will be 1 inch or 2 inch
Suggestion : Suitable for indoor and outdoor significant signboard.
C. Normal Signboard
- GI Colorbond
Description : A common 2D signboard that people often use and is low cost and durable.
Material :
- Galvanized Iron colorbond / Poly carbonate as base
- Aluminium angle as frame
- UV Printing white sticker or color sticker (Oracal 651) as visual
Description : Special textured signboard base for outdoor use only.
Material :
- Aluminum strip as base with powder coating color
- Powder coating/ 2K spray paint (oracal/pantone code)
- Banner Signboard
Description : Using banner as the signboard, low price and also low quality.
Material : Printing UV tarpaulin, wrapping or zigzag finishing.
D. Lightbox
- Normal Lightbox
Material :
- 6mm Polycarbonate with uv lightbox sticker/ oracal sticker as surface, lighting with t8 LED tube, side cover with aluminum coil.
Suggestion : Suitable outdoor signage for night businesses.
- Aluminium Lightbox
Material :
- 3mm Lighting white acrylic sheet as surface
- Aluminum box up
- lighting with t8 LED tube / LED Module / strip inside with transformer
- Crystal Aluminium Lightbox
Material :
- Aluminum lightbox die cut wording with LED inside
- 10mm Acrylic 3D wording with sticker
Suggest : Usually for indoor signage with small wording, they are more elegant and can be seen clearly from eye level.
- Soft Fabric Lightbox
Material :
- Printing on soft fabric as surface with LED tube inside
- Aluminum casing
- LED lighting with transformer
Suggest : Suitable for indoor signage only.
- Aluminum Casing Lightbox
Material :
- 3mm Lighting white acrylic sheet as surface
- Aluminum standard casing with LED tube inside
- LED lighting with transformer
Suggest : Suitable for indoor signage, more elegance and easy to maintenance.
